legalStructure: Permissioned Maple Cash Management Pool lending arrangement. Eligible lenders deposit USDC and receive MPLcashUSDC pool LP tokens; the pool lends to Room40 Capital's standalone single-purpose borrower SPV, which invests in U.S. Treasury bills and Treasury-bill-collateralized reverse repurchase agreements.
targetInvestors: U.S. accredited investors / eligible accredited investors subject to KYC and AML screening

metadata.borrowerType: Standalone single-purpose vehicle of Room40 Capital
metadata.custodianSourceNote: RWA.xyz lists J.P. Morgan as custodian and StoneX as traditional broker; Maple official docs describe use of a regulated broker / prime brokerage account without naming it in the parsed page.
dataGaps: No public legal opinion URL found.
No public independent reserve audit or attestation found.
No current primary-market APY value captured for MPLcashUSDC.
